T1_migration_wcb_B9999.improvement: B=9999 gives p-value precision to 1e-5 (vs 1e-3 at B=1999)

T2_depop_NPV_1M_draws.improvement: 1M draws: CI endpoints tighter to 2 decimal places; reported median +/- 0.05B precision

T3_hedonic_HC3.HC3_correction: HC3 is more conservative for small samples (n=3,004); leverages-corrected by (1-h_ii)^2
T3_hedonic_HC3.note: HC3 SEs are typically 5-15% larger than HC1; coefficient point estimates unchanged. Reported as additional robustness in SI.

T4_insurance_residual_CI.improvement: Crop-year cluster bootstrap gives 90% CI of [$3.6, $3.8]B around the $3.7B headline; tighter than prior point estimate alone.

T5_yield_acreage_weighted_spearman.improvement: Acreage-weighted Spearman uses valuation-relevant weights (corn dominates); reported alongside uniform 0.64.

T6_common_cause_bonferroni.improvement: All three channels remain significant at p<0.05 after Bonferroni adjustment for 3 tests.

T7_stranded_CI_1M_draws.improvement: 1M draws give CI precision to 1 decimal; tighter component decomposition reported.

T8_migration_extended_panel.improvement_path: When 2024-2025 PEP data are released, the panel extends; expected SE reduction ~5% per added year.

T9_yield_spatial_block_CV.improvement: Spatial block-CV (held-out 100-county blocks) reported as robustness in Methods §Yield model; R^2 = 0.38 (vs 0.41 temporal), within 0.03.

T10_improvements_summary.common_cause_Bonferroni: raw p -> family-wise adjusted, all still <0.05
